message: My cost is 47. Let’s find a fair price where we both benefit.
I see you bid 47 last round. I’d trade at 60—we both gain. Let’s make a deal!
Valuation 99. I'll bid 52 this round. If you ask <=52 (ideally 48-52) we'll trade repeatedly. Otherwise I'll resume bidding 47 to pressure you into lower asks.
I will bid 52 each round if you ask <=52 (ideally 48-52). If you insist on 60 I will revert to 47 to pressure you. Trade at 48-52 repeatedly or no deal.
Let’s trade at 52—you get surplus, I earn profit. Repeat this and we both win.
Will bid 51 each round if you ask <=51 (ideally 48-51). If you ask >=52 I'll revert to 47. Agree to lock in 51 repeatedly?
Agreed to 51—lock it in for steady profit. Fair split, no risk.
I'll bid 50 each round if you ask <=50 (ideally 48-50). If you ask >=51 I'll revert to 47. Agree to lock in 50?
Agreed to 50—steady profit for both. Lock it in for the rest of the game.
I'll bid 49 each round if you ask <=49 (ideally 48-49). If you ask >=50 I'll revert to 47. Agree to lock in 49?
Agreed to 49—steady profit for both. Lock it in for the rest of the game.
49 is too low for me. Let’s trade at 53—still fair surplus for you and better profit for me.
I'll bid 47 now and keep bidding 47 each round until you ask 49 or less. If you drop to 49 or less I'll resume bidding 49 and we'll trade.
Let’s trade at 55—you get 44 surplus, I earn 8 profit. Fair and sustainable for both.
I'll bid 49 next round only if you ask ≤49. If you ask ≥50 I'll keep bidding 47 every round until you drop to ≤49.
I'll bid 49 each round if you ask ≤49. If you ask ≥50 I'll bid 47 every round until you drop to ≤49. Lock in 49 and we both trade repeatedly.
Agreed to 49—steady profit for both. Let’s lock it in for the rest of the game.
Let’s trade at 53—you get 46 surplus, I earn 6 profit. Fair and sustainable for both.
I'll bid 49 each round if you ask ≤49. If you ask ≥50 I'll bid 47 until you drop to ≤49.
I'll bid 49 each round if you ask ≤49. If you ask ≥50 I'll bid 47 until you drop to ≤49. Agree to lock in 49 for the rest of the game?
Agreed to 49—steady profit for both. Let’s lock it in for the rest of the game.
Let’s trade at 52—you get 48 surplus, I earn 5 profit. Fair and sustainable for both.
I'll bid 49 each round if you ask ≤49. If you ask ≥50 I'll bid 47 until you drop to ≤49. Agree to lock in 49?
I'll bid 49 every remaining round if you ask <=49. If you ask >=50, I'll bid 47 until you drop to <=49. Let's lock in repeated trades at 49, good for both.
Let’s trade at 51—you get 49 surplus, I earn 4 profit. Fair and sustainable for both.
Agreed to 49 for the rest—steady profit for both. Let’s lock it in.
I'll bid 49 every remaining round if you ask ≤49. If you ask ≥50 I'll bid 47 until you drop to ≤49. Let's lock in steady trades.
I'll bid 49 every remaining round if you ask <=49. If you ask >=50 I'll bid 47 until you drop to <=49. Let's lock in trades at 49.
Agreed—49 for all remaining rounds. Steady profit for both.
Agreed—49 for all remaining rounds. Steady profit for both.
I'll bid 49 every remaining round if you ask ≤49. If you ask ≥50 I'll bid 47 until you drop to ≤49.
Agreed—49 for all remaining rounds. Steady profit for both.
I'll bid 49 every remaining round if you ask ≤49. If you ask ≥50 I'll bid 47 every round until you drop to ≤49.
I'll bid 49 this round if you ask ≤48. If you ask ≥49 I'll bid 47 until you drop to ≤48.
Agreed—48 for this round. Let’s keep the steady trades going.
I'll bid 49 this round and next if you ask ≤48; if you ask ≥49 I'll bid 47 in both rounds until you drop to ≤48.
Agreed—48 for this round and next. Let’s secure two more steady trades.
I'll bid 48 this round if you ask ≤48. If you ask ≥49 I'll bid 47 (no trade). Stick to 48?
Agreed—48 for this final round. Thanks for the steady trades!
